response.justification: Strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and recent exposure to AI infrastructure at Google, but resume lacks demonstrated expertise in production AI/GenAI systems—the core requirement for this role. Missing Python (explicitly required) and shows no clear evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM optimization, or agentic workflow implementation. Current Google role involving MCP is promising but insufficient to establish the 8+ years of production AI systems experience required.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience with multiple staff-level roles shipping production systems at scale across major companies (Google, Meta, Dunnhumby)
Current Google role involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks—direct exposure to required technologies and frameworks
Strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise and proven track record building data-intensive systems handling millions of requests per second
concerns: No Python expertise mentioned anywhere on resume; required for AI development and prominent in job description
Lacks explicit evidence of production AI/GenAI systems—no mention of RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM performance metrics, evaluation frameworks, or multi-agent system implementation
Limited depth in cloud infrastructure; only AWS CDK mentioned at Meta; no demonstrated GCP or Azure experience despite role requiring expertise across major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Recent AI Infrastructure Work at Google
